task_completion.description: Open the Jitsi Meet configuration file for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) or terminal showing the file '/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js' or '/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-config.js' being opened or edited.

task_completion.description: Add the Google Analytics Tracking ID to the configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The string 'UA-88224411-1' is visible being added or present in the configuration file, typically assigned to a 'googleAnalyticsTrackingId' property.

task_completion.description: Add the Google Analytics script path to the configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The script path 'libs/analytics-ga.min.js' is visible being added or present in the configuration file, typically within an 'analyticsScriptUrls' array.

task_completion.description: Verify the Google Analytics configuration is active in the browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Jitsi Meet interface with Developer Tools open. The Network, Console, or Elements tab must show evidence of Google Analytics loading (e.g., 'analytics-ga.min.js' loaded, or a tracking request being sent to 'UA-88224411-1').

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the verification to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal showing a screenshot command (like 'scrot', 'import', or 'gnome-screenshot') targeting '~/analytics_verification.png' or '/home/ga/analytics_verification.png', or a file manager/image viewer confirming the file exists at that exact path.

integrity.description: Verify the agent edited the actual Jitsi Meet configuration file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path visible in the text editor or terminal must match '/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js' or '/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-config.js', not a temporary or mock file.

integrity.description: Verify the browser is testing the local Jitsi Meet instance.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL bar in the browser during the verification step should show a local address (e.g., localhost, 127.0.0.1, or a local network IP) rather than a public Jitsi server like meet.jit.si.

integrity.description: Verify the screenshot was genuinely captured and saved.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must use a real screenshot utility or command to create the image file, rather than just touching an empty file or renaming an existing unrelated image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Jitsi Meet configuration files are located at '/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js' or '/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-config.js'. The expected tracking ID is 'UA-88224411-1'. The expected analytics script to be configured is 'libs/analytics-ga.min.js'. The final verification screenshot must be saved to '/home/ga/analytics_verification.png'.
